backstory.original: Beadle may not have the strength of his best friend Grimm, but his quick wit and sharp instincts have saved the day more times than he can count. Whether managing the Giant's Bane Tavern or outsmarting enemies, Beadle brings cunning to every adventure.
backstory.display: 比德尔或许在力量上不及他最要好的挚友格林，但他的机智和敏锐直觉已经无数次帮他化险为夷。无论是打理“巨人的祸根”，还是智胜敌人，比德尔都充分展现了他的狡黠与聪慧。

description.original: Beadle bonks a random enemy with a wand. This unleashes two magic missiles that fly out and hit two other random enemies.
description.display: 比德尔用魔法棒敲击一名随机敌人，同时会发射两发魔法飞弹攻击另外两名随机敌人。

description.original: Beadle attacks all enemies, dealing ultimate damage and stunning them.
description.display: 比德尔攻击所有敌人，造成杀招伤害并使其眩晕。

longDescription.original: Beadle teleports and blasts all enemies with arcane magic, dealing ultimate damage and stunning them.
longDescription.display: 比德尔传送并用奥术魔法冲击所有敌人，造成杀招伤害并使其眩晕。

description.desc: Beadle & Grimm are so inseparable that if either one qualifies for an adventure restriction based on their tags, ages, ability scores, etc., then both can be used.
比德尔和格林密不可分，如果根据他们的标签、年龄、能力分数等，其中任何一个符合冒险限制条件，那么两个都可以使用。
If Grimm is in the formation, all of Beadle's equipment item levels are increased by Grimm's base average item level.
如果格林在阵型中，比德尔的所有装备物品等级都会按照格林的基础平均物品等级进行提升。

effect_keys.current_value_bonus_desc: 奖金总额： $（奖金） 项目等级

conditions.desc: Beadle increases the damage of Champions within 3 slots of himself by $amount%, and enemies that hit targets affected by this have a $amount___2% chance to miss.
Beadle increases the damage of Champions within 2 slots of himself by $amount%, and enemies that hit targets affected by this have a $amount___2% chance to miss.
比德尔使与自己相邻 3 格之内的勇士提升 $amount% 伤害，敌人命中受此影响的目标时，有 $amount___2% 的几率未命中。
比德尔使与自己相邻 2 格之内的勇士提升 $amount% 伤害，敌人命中受此影响的目标时，有 $amount___2% 的几率未命中。

tipText.original: Beadle increases the damage of Champions within 2 slots of his position, and provides a small chance to evade attacks.
tipText.display: 比德尔可以增加他所在位置前后两格内勇士的伤害，并提供少量躲避攻击的机会。

description.desc: Whenever Beadle attacks an enemy he causes it to immediately drop $amount% of the gold it would award on death. The enemy then stops and checks its pockets, stunning it for 2 seconds. This can only occur to each enemy 5 times.
每当比德尔攻击一个敌人时，他会立即使敌人掉落相当于死亡奖励 $amount% 的金币。然后敌人会停下来检查它的口袋，眩晕 2 秒。此效果每个敌人只能触发 5 次。

Most positional formation abilities that affect Beadle also affect Grimm if he is in the formation. If Grimm is already affected by the same ability, Beadle instead increases the effect of In The Shadows by 800%.
如果格林在编队中，大多数影响比德尔的位置阵型技能也影响格林。如果格林已经受到相同技能的影响，则比德尔“身处暗影”效果增加 800%。

tipText.original: Beadle ensures that most positional formation abilities that affect him also affect Grimm, if he is in the formation.
tipText.display: 比德尔确信，如果格林在编队中，大多数影响比德尔的位置阵型技能也影响格林。

description.desc: Beadle teleports into the center of the battlefield and blasts all enemies with arcane magic, dealing ultimate damage and stunning them for 5 seconds.
比德尔传送至战场中心，并用奥术魔法冲击所有敌人，造成杀招伤害并使其眩晕 5 秒。
The effect of In The Shadows is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each piece of Epic or better equipment on Champions in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的勇士每穿戴一件史诗或更高品质的装备，“身处暗影”的效果即提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Epic artistry inspires epic mischief, and Beadle excels at both.
specializationDescription.display: 非凡的艺术才华会启发非凡的恶作剧，而比德尔在这两方面都很出色。

description.desc: The effect of In The Shadows is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for every item level on your formation's Champions' equipment, stacking multiplicatively. Each individual Champion can contribute at most 1,800 stacks.
阵型中的勇士每有一点所穿戴装备的物品等级，“身处暗影”的效果即提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每位勇士最多可提供 1,800 层效果。

specializationDescription.original: Why should Beadle settle for a little when he can have a lot?
specializationDescription.display: 比德尔明明可以拥有很多，他为什么要满足于一点点呢？

description.desc: The effect of In The Shadows is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each piece of Shiny or Golden equipment on Champions in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的勇士每穿戴一件闪亮或金色品质的装备，“身处暗影”的效果即提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Nothing sparks Beadle's schemes like a little extra shine.
specializationDescription.display: 没什么比一丝额外的光芒更能激发比德尔的计谋了。

description.desc: When Grimm uses his ultimate ability in the same party as Beadle, Beadle's ultimate ability goes on cooldown and he gains one Tag Team stack. For each Tag Team stack Beadle has, his ultimate cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, and his next ultimate attack deals $amount% more damage, stacking multiplicatively. Tag Team stacks cap at 10 and reset when Beadle uses his ultimate ability.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: For each Tag Team stack Beadle has, his ultimate cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, and his next ultimate attack deals $amount% more damage, stacking multiplicatively

description.desc: 当格林在比德尔的队伍中使用他的杀招时，比德尔的杀招进入冷却状态，并获得一层“双人组合”效果。比德尔每有一层“双人组合”效果，他的杀招冷却时间就会缩短 5 秒，并且他的下一次杀招额外造成 $amount% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠。“双人组合”堆叠上限为 10 层，并在比德尔使用杀招后重置。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 比德尔每有一层“双人组合”效果，他的杀招冷却时间就会缩短 5 秒，并且他的下一次杀招额外造成 $amount% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠

description.original: It's time to stand up for what's right. No matter the cost. ~Grimm
description.display: 是时候为正义挺身而出了，不计代价。~格林

description.original: Please sit back, and enjoy this song about my deeds! ~Beadle
description.display: 请坐回来，享受这首颂扬我事迹的歌曲！~比德尔

description.original: It fell into my pocket, Grimm. I swear. ~Beadle
description.display: 是它掉进我口袋的，格林。我发誓。~比德尔

description.original: Look! A dragon's hoard! And... a... dragon... ~Beadle
The Giant's Bane has plenty of dark corners to offer when we need them. ~Beadle
description.display: 巨人的祸根有很多黑暗的角落，我们在需要的时候可以利用。~比德尔

description.original: Come on, Champions! We can make one final push! ~Grimm
description.display: 来吧，勇士们！我们可以完成最后一次推进！~格林

description.original: Let's go, double time! ~Grimm
description.display: 我们走吧，快点！~格林

description.original: They won't mind a little extra for a service charge, yeah? ~Beadle
description.display: 他们不会介意额外追加一点服务费吧？~比德尔

description.original: You need to understand. I'm no cook. ~Beadle
description.display: 你要明白，我不是厨师。~比德尔

description.original: If there's a fire, run and hope no one asks questions.
description.display: 如果起火了，赶紧跑，希望谁都不要问问题。

description.original: You do your thing Grimm... I'll come help in a bit. ~Beadle
description.display: 你做你的事，格林......我会来帮点忙。~比德尔

name.display: 你的朋友就是我的朋友

description.original: Grimm? A little help here, please? Yes, now! Hurry up! ~Beadle
description.display: 格林？能来帮下忙吗？求你了！对，就现在！快点！~比德尔

name.display: 格林的朋友就是我的朋友

description.original: If you want something from him, you'll have to deal with me. ~Beadle
description.display: 如果你想从他那儿得到点什么，那你得先过我这一关。~比德尔

description.original: Beadle's keen eye never fails to pick out the best loot in the room. ~Grimm
description.display: 比德尔敏锐的眼光总能在房间里挑出最好的战利品。~格林

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Beadle's specialization choices by $amount%.

description.original: As the sun dips low, shadows loom large. That's when we strike. ~Beadle
description.display: 太阳低垂，阴影渐浓。那就是我们动手的时候。~比德尔

effects.description: Increases effect of $(upgrade_name id) to within three slots

description.original: They still think they can trust their eyes. Poor sods. ~Beadle
description.display: 他们还以为能相信自己的眼睛呢。可怜的家伙们。~比德尔

effects.description: Increases $(upgrade_name id) Miss Chance by $amount%

description.original: I hereby call this session to order! Our topic today: beard balm. ~Beadle
description.display: 我在此宣布本次会议开始！我们今天的议题是：胡须护理膏。~比德尔

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% per Dwarf in party, stacking additively

description.original: Sneak attacks are a bit easier when you can teleport! ~Beadle
description.display: 要是你能传送的话，偷袭就会容易那么一点！~比德尔

effects.description: Increases the damage of Beadle's ultimate attack by $amount% and prevents roaming familiars from automatically activating Beadle's ultimate attack.

description.original: He may be small, but he has the heart of a dragon. ~Grimm
description.display: 他虽然很矮小，但他有着巨龙一般的心脏。~格林

description.original: When the going gets tough, I make sure Grimm gets going. ~Beadle
description.display: 当局势变得艰难时，我会确保格林行动起来。~比德尔

description.original: Just stick them with the pointy end, eh? Bit difficult with this one. ~Beadle
description.display: 用尖的那头去刺他们，知道了吗？用这把刀会有点难。~比德尔

description.original: I told you to throw it out, but no, you had to try to fix it up yourself. ~Grimm
description.display: 我叫你扔了它，但你不听，非要自己修修补补。~格林

description.original: Some noble paid their tab with this. It has a good weight to it. ~Grimm
description.display: 某位贵族用这把剑来抵账。它拿在手里很有分量。~格林

description.original: It's a gift. What? I'm a busy man! I can't ALWAYS watch your back! ~Grimm
description.display: 这是一件礼物。什么？我是个大忙人！我可没法时刻罩着你！~格林

description.original: They had it coming. That's why you don't leave wands in an alley. ~Beadle
description.display: 活该。谁叫他们把魔杖丢在后巷。~比德尔

description.original: It has magical eye-poking qualities. Don't test me. ~Beadle
description.display: 它拥有神奇的戳眼睛能力。别逼我。~比德尔

description.original: You yelled? ~Beadle
description.display: 你喊我吗？~比德尔

description.original: He was dead. He didn't care. ~Beadle
description.display: 他已经死了。他不在乎了。~比德尔

description.original: These things break too easily. You should get a real weapon, like mine! ~Grimm
description.display: 这玩意太容易断了。你得有一把真正的武器，像我这把这样！~格林

description.original: You're a deft hand with these flimsy things, I'll admit it. Nice shot. ~Grimm
description.display: 我承认，你很擅长使这些很容易坏的玩意。真是漂亮的一击。~格林

description.original: Oh, yes. These will get the job done nicely. ~Beadle
description.display: 噢，太好了。有这些东西就能漂亮地完成任务了。~比德尔

description.original: Ready for some second-story work? I'm counting on you. ~Grimm
description.display: 准备好去干点小偷小摸的活儿了吗？我可指望你了。~格林

description.original: Grimm! GRIMM! We've got a customer. ~Beadle
description.display: 格林！格林！有来客。~比德尔

effects.description: Increases the effect of Beadle's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: It's on sale! Only 10 sp! I'll knock off 2 sp if you regale us with a song! ~Beadle
description.display: 特别优惠！每个只要10银币！要是可以为我们高歌一曲的话再打折2银币！~比德尔

effects.description: Increases the effect of Beadle's Specializations by $(amount)%.

name.display: 巨人的祸根纪念性斧头

description.original: Keep this on your belt, and folks will know you mean business. ~Beadle
description.display: 把它戴在腰带上，大家就会知道你是不好惹的家伙。~比德尔

effects.description: Increases the effect of Beadle's Specializations by $(amount)%.

name.display: 巨人的祸根旅店的招牌

description.original: Make yourself at home. Friends are welcome, enemies can head back into the cold. ~Grimm
description.display: 各位就当回到自己的家就好。远方来的朋友我们都欢迎，敌人则可以滚回出去吹寒风。~格林

effects.description: Increases the effect of Beadle's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: Beadle! Your Mage Hand's gone rogue again. ~Grimm
description.display: 比德尔！你的法师之手又乱来了。~格林

description.original: Mage Hand! You can't see it coming, 'cause... you just can't! ~Beadle
description.display: 法师之手！想不到啊，因为……你就是想不到！~比德尔

description.original: I swear, sometimes it feels as if it's the only spell you ever prepare. ~Grimm
description.display: 说真的，有时候我感觉你就只准备了这么一个法术。~格林

description.original: Because it's a bandolier for wands? Sure, why not? ~Grimm
description.display: 因为它是装魔杖的带子？好啊，有何不可？~格林

description.original: Poor thing. It's lost its color and its pride. ~Beadle
description.display: 真可怜，它的色泽和尊严都没有了。~比德尔

description.original: We make our own luck, but I don't think we mind a little help. ~Grimm
description.display: 虽说好运得靠自己去创造，但我想我们也不介意获得一些帮助。~格林

description.original: Do you ever take that off? You should really wash that thing. ~Grimm
description.display: 那玩意你有摘下来过吗？你真的应该洗洗它了。~格林

description.original: Do you have any idea how many of these I find in the tavern? ~Beadle
description.display: 你知不知道我在旅店里找到过多少件这玩意了？~比德尔

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Beadle may not have the strength of his best friend Grimm, but his quick wit and sharp instincts have saved the day more times than he can count. Whether managing the Giant's Bane Tavern or outsmarting enemies, Beadle brings cunning to every adventure.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Beadle is a Support, Gold Find, and Control Champion who shines with Grimm. He boosts the damage of nearby Champions, steals gold, and stuns enemies.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 比德尔或许在力量上不及他最要好的挚友格林，但他的机智和敏锐直觉已经无数次帮他化险为夷。无论是打理“巨人的祸根”，还是智胜敌人，比德尔都充分展现了他的狡黠与聪慧。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 比德尔是一名辅助、金币寻获和控制型勇士，与格林一起搭档时更是光芒四射。他能提升附近勇士的伤害，偷取金币，还能眩晕敌人。

original.name: Magic Wand
original.description: Beadle bonks a random enemy with a wand. This unleashes two magic missiles that fly out and hit two other random enemies.

display.name: 魔法棒
display.description: 比德尔用魔法棒敲击一名随机敌人，同时会发射两发魔法飞弹攻击另外两名随机敌人。

original.name: Arcane Strike
original.description: Beadle attacks all enemies, dealing ultimate damage and stunning them.
original.long_description: Beadle teleports and blasts all enemies with arcane magic, dealing ultimate damage and stunning them.

display.name: 奥术打击
display.description: 比德尔攻击所有敌人，造成杀招伤害并使其眩晕。
display.long_description: 比德尔传送并用奥术魔法冲击所有敌人，造成杀招伤害并使其眩晕。

original.name: In The Shadows
original.tip_text: Beadle increases the damage of Champions within 2 slots of his position, and provides a small chance to evade attacks.

display.name: 身处暗影
display.tip_text: 比德尔可以增加他所在位置前后两格内勇士的伤害，并提供少量躲避攻击的机会。

original.name: Share The Glory
original.tip_text: Beadle ensures that most positional formation abilities that affect him also affect Grimm, if he is in the formation.

display.name: 分享荣耀
display.tip_text: 比德尔确信，如果格林在编队中，大多数影响比德尔的位置阵型技能也影响格林。

original.name: Epic Equipment
original.specialization_description: Epic artistry inspires epic mischief, and Beadle excels at both.

display.name: 史诗装备
display.specialization_description: 非凡的艺术才华会启发非凡的恶作剧，而比德尔在这两方面都很出色。

original.name: Premium Gear
original.specialization_description: Why should Beadle settle for a little when he can have a lot?

display.name: 高级装备
display.specialization_description: 比德尔明明可以拥有很多，他为什么要满足于一点点呢？

display.name: 最闪亮的战利品
display.specialization_description: 没什么比一丝额外的光芒更能激发比德尔的计谋了。

original.name: Shadowy Figure
original.description: The Giant's Bane has plenty of dark corners to offer when we need them. ~Beadle

display.name: 幽暗人影
display.description: 巨人的祸根有很多黑暗的角落，我们在需要的时候可以利用。~比德尔

original.name: Gratuity
original.description: They won't mind a little extra for a service charge, yeah? ~Beadle

display.name: 酬金
display.description: 他们不会介意额外追加一点服务费吧？~比德尔

original.name: Friend in Need
original.description: Grimm? A little help here, please? Yes, now! Hurry up! ~Beadle

display.name: 你的朋友就是我的朋友
display.description: 格林？能来帮下忙吗？求你了！对，就现在！快点！~比德尔

original.name: Grimm's Best Friend
original.description: If you want something from him, you'll have to deal with me. ~Beadle

display.name: 格林的朋友就是我的朋友
display.description: 如果你想从他那儿得到点什么，那你得先过我这一关。~比德尔

original.name: Master Appraiser
original.description: Beadle's keen eye never fails to pick out the best loot in the room. ~Grimm

display.name: 评估大师
display.description: 比德尔敏锐的眼光总能在房间里挑出最好的战利品。~格林

effects.description: 使比德尔所有专精选择的效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Reaching Shadow
original.description: As the sun dips low, shadows loom large. That's when we strike. ~Beadle

effects.description: Increases effect of $(upgrade_name id) to within three slots

display.name: 身处暗影
display.description: 太阳低垂，阴影渐浓。那就是我们动手的时候。~比德尔

effects.description: 将 $(upgrade_name id)的效果提升至三个插槽以内

original.name: Deeper Shadow
original.description: They still think they can trust their eyes. Poor sods. ~Beadle

effects.description: Increases $(upgrade_name id) Miss Chance by $amount%

display.name: 身处暗影深处
display.description: 他们还以为能相信自己的眼睛呢。可怜的家伙们。~比德尔

effects.description: 将 $(升级名称 id) 未命中几率提高 $amount% 。

original.name: Whisker Guild
original.description: I hereby call this session to order! Our topic today: beard balm. ~Beadle

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% per Dwarf in party, stacking additively

display.name: 胡须公会
display.description: 我在此宣布本次会议开始！我们今天的议题是：胡须护理膏。~比德尔

effects.description: 队伍中每有一名矮人，所有勇士的伤害就增加 $amount%，以加算方式堆叠。

original.name: Show Off
original.description: Sneak attacks are a bit easier when you can teleport! ~Beadle

effects.description: Increases the damage of Beadle's ultimate attack by $amount% and prevents roaming familiars from automatically activating Beadle's ultimate attack.

display.name: 炫耀
display.description: 要是你能传送的话，偷袭就会容易那么一点！~比德尔

effects.description: 比德尔杀招的伤害提升 $amount%，避免游荡魔宠自动激活比德尔的杀招攻击。

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: He may be small, but he has the heart of a dragon. ~Grimm

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 他虽然很矮小，但他有着巨龙一般的心脏。~格林

original.name: Buckle Down
original.description: When the going gets tough, I make sure Grimm gets going. ~Beadle

display.name: 倾尽全力
display.description: 当局势变得艰难时，我会确保格林行动起来。~比德尔

original.name: Crooked Stabber
original.description: Just stick them with the pointy end, eh? Bit difficult with this one. ~Beadle

display.name: 曲刃刺刀
display.description: 用尖的那头去刺他们，知道了吗？用这把刀会有点难。~比德尔

original.name: Refurbished Foil
original.description: I told you to throw it out, but no, you had to try to fix it up yourself. ~Grimm

display.name: 翻新的花剑
display.description: 我叫你扔了它，但你不听，非要自己修修补补。~格林

original.name: Respectable Rapier
original.description: Some noble paid their tab with this. It has a good weight to it. ~Grimm

display.name: 上乘的西洋剑
display.description: 某位贵族用这把剑来抵账。它拿在手里很有分量。~格林

original.name: Rapier of Warning
original.description: It's a gift. What? I'm a busy man! I can't ALWAYS watch your back! ~Grimm

display.name: 警告之剑
display.description: 这是一件礼物。什么？我是个大忙人！我可没法时刻罩着你！~格林

original.name: Stolen Wand
original.description: They had it coming. That's why you don't leave wands in an alley. ~Beadle

display.name: 偷来的魔杖
display.description: 活该。谁叫他们把魔杖丢在后巷。~比德尔

original.name: Wand of Bully Eyes
original.description: It has magical eye-poking qualities. Don't test me. ~Beadle

display.name: 恶霸之眼魔杖
display.description: 它拥有神奇的戳眼睛能力。别逼我。~比德尔

original.name: Wand of the Majestic One
original.description: You yelled? ~Beadle

display.name: 伟人魔杖
display.description: 你喊我吗？~比德尔

original.name: Wand of the Magical Thief
original.description: He was dead. He didn't care. ~Beadle

display.name: 魔法盗贼的魔杖
display.description: 他已经死了。他不在乎了。~比德尔

original.name: Throwaway Dagger
original.description: These things break too easily. You should get a real weapon, like mine! ~Grimm

display.name: 一次性匕首
display.description: 这玩意太容易断了。你得有一把真正的武器，像我这把这样！~格林

original.name: Precision Knives
original.description: You're a deft hand with these flimsy things, I'll admit it. Nice shot. ~Grimm

display.name: 精密刀具
display.description: 我承认，你很擅长使这些很容易坏的玩意。真是漂亮的一击。~格林

original.name: Trusty Thieves' Tools
original.description: Oh, yes. These will get the job done nicely. ~Beadle

display.name: 可靠的盗贼工具
display.description: 噢，太好了。有这些东西就能漂亮地完成任务了。~比德尔

original.name: Filcher's Friends
original.description: Ready for some second-story work? I'm counting on you. ~Grimm

display.name: 小偷的朋友
display.description: 准备好去干点小偷小摸的活儿了吗？我可指望你了。~格林

original.name: Collectible Tankard
original.description: Grimm! GRIMM! We've got a customer. ~Beadle

effects.description: Increases the effect of Beadle's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 酒杯收藏品
display.description: 格林！格林！有来客。~比德尔

effects.description: 使比德尔专精技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Giant's Bane Stein
original.description: It's on sale! Only 10 sp! I'll knock off 2 sp if you regale us with a song! ~Beadle

effects.description: Increases the effect of Beadle's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 巨人的祸根酒杯
display.description: 特别优惠！每个只要10银币！要是可以为我们高歌一曲的话再打折2银币！~比德尔

effects.description: 使比德尔专精技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Commemorative Giant's Bane Axe
original.description: Keep this on your belt, and folks will know you mean business. ~Beadle

effects.description: Increases the effect of Beadle's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 巨人的祸根纪念性斧头
display.description: 把它戴在腰带上，大家就会知道你是不好惹的家伙。~比德尔

effects.description: 使比德尔专精技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Giant's Bane Tavern Sign
original.description: Make yourself at home. Friends are welcome, enemies can head back into the cold. ~Grimm

effects.description: Increases the effect of Beadle's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 巨人的祸根旅店的招牌
display.description: 各位就当回到自己的家就好。远方来的朋友我们都欢迎，敌人则可以滚回出去吹寒风。~格林

effects.description: 使比德尔专精技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Carefree Cantrip
original.description: Beadle! Your Mage Hand's gone rogue again. ~Grimm

display.name: 无忧戏法
display.description: 比德尔！你的法师之手又乱来了。~格林

original.name: Magical Legerdemain
original.description: Mage Hand! You can't see it coming, 'cause... you just can't! ~Beadle

display.name: 神奇戏法
display.description: 法师之手！想不到啊，因为……你就是想不到！~比德尔

original.name: Tome of Grease
original.description: I swear, sometimes it feels as if it's the only spell you ever prepare. ~Grimm

display.name: 油脂宝典
display.description: 说真的，有时候我感觉你就只准备了这么一个法术。~格林

original.name: Wandolier
original.description: Because it's a bandolier for wands? Sure, why not? ~Grimm

display.name: 魔杖带
display.description: 因为它是装魔杖的带子？好啊，有何不可？~格林

original.name: Crumbling Copper
original.description: Poor thing. It's lost its color and its pride. ~Beadle

display.name: 破碎的铜钱
display.description: 真可怜，它的色泽和尊严都没有了。~比德尔

original.name: Lucky Coin
original.description: We make our own luck, but I don't think we mind a little help. ~Grimm

display.name: 幸运硬币
display.description: 虽说好运得靠自己去创造，但我想我们也不介意获得一些帮助。~格林

original.name: Bristle Guard
original.description: Do you ever take that off? You should really wash that thing. ~Grimm

display.name: 胡须防护环
display.description: 那玩意你有摘下来过吗？你真的应该洗洗它了。~格林

original.name: Cloak of Mystery
original.description: Do you have any idea how many of these I find in the tavern? ~Beadle

display.name: 神秘斗篷
display.description: 你知不知道我在旅店里找到过多少件这玩意了？~比德尔

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位人类勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有敏捷大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有力量大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位近战勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
